request.job_description: Drivetrain is on a mission to empower businesses to make better decisions. Our financial planning & decision-making platform helps companies scale and achieve their targets predictably. Drivetrain is ...

response.summary: Experienced Product Manager with a background in B2B SaaS platforms and a proven track record of driving product strategy from zero-to-one. I specialize in building robust API ecosystems and technical architectures while maintaining a deep, research-driven focus on customer needs. Thriving in remote-first environments, I bridge the gap between complex engineering trade-offs and business goals.
